side_effects.description: Red/burning before tan develops, requires higher doses with slower shipping

protocol_notes: User notes that shipping time significantly impacts potency. Faster DHL Express delivery (2 days) from Chang biofuscus ltd resulted in better potency with no burning. Slower deliveries (2+ weeks) resulted in weaker results and burning sensations. Final order from Harbin Jixianglong Biotech Co., Ltd resulted in quality product with great tan results. User reports that UV exposure patterns may also affect burning (insufficient buildup with weaker MT2).
